examples: The little prefabricated hut was lifted away by a huge crane.
You haven't lived till you've learned how to yodel at a tea dance in a mountain hut!
Heidi just now came out of the hut.
Do we start bailing out GM, Chrysler, the guy running the gas station, a Pizza Hut?
Now, Pizza Hut (or Gallo, for that matter) may not make the hottest impression on a first date.
